titleStmt.title: SII 42.80: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 80. (A.R. No. B. 42 of 1954-55.) Pallepāḍu, Nellore Taluk, Nellore District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone lying in the compound of the Rāmēśvarasvāmin temple.
Dated in Śaka 14[27] for 1426 Raktākshin, Vaiśākha, śu. 7, Wednesday, corresponding to A.D., 1504, April 21. The week-day however was Sunday.

States that Boppuḍi Vīramarasa, son of Venkaṭaya and Vīramāṁbā, grandson of Sūraparāja and Ōbhuḷamma and great grandson of Satyarāja Ōbhaḷayya of Bhāradvāja-gōtra, Yajus-śākhā and Āpastaṁba-sūtra, built the temple of Rāmēśvara at Pallipāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīrāma śrī svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana Above this line, the following line is incised, probably at a later period:[muccikrōla] ggalyagāri kaṇa .
śakavarṣaṁbbulu 1427 Agunēṭi raktākṣi saṁvvatsara
vaiśākha śu 7 bu nāṁḍu puṣyā nakṣatrāna dakṣa(kṣi)ṇa kailā
sa nivāsuṁḍaina pallipāṭi rāmēsva(śva)runki Āpastaṁ
bha(ba) yajuśśākhādhyāyulaina bhāradvājagōtṛ(tru)laina
satyarāju Ōbhalayya papra(prapau)tṛ(tru)ṁḍu sūraparāju
Ōbhuḷamma pautṛ(tru)ḍu veṁkkaṭaya vīramāṁbā pu
tṛ(tru)ṁḍaina boppuḍi vīramarasu dēvaḷaṁ gaṭṭiṁcenu
Digital edition of SII 42.80 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
